---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a package capability, workflow improvement, or documentation enhancement.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

## Proposed direction

Describe the behavior or repository improvement you want to see.

## Configuration or usage example

Provide a small example when possible.

```json
{
  "mode": "error"
}
```

## Dependency proposal

Complete this section only when the request adds or changes a third-party dependency.

- Package:
- Version:
- Purpose:
- License:
- Alternatives considered:
- Security considerations:

## Expected outcome

Describe what success looks like.

## Alternatives considered

List any other approaches and why they are less suitable.

## Additional context

Include related issues, prior art, or constraints if relevant.
